nasb.text: The other lamb you shall offer at twilight; as the grain offering of the morning and as its drink offering, you shall offer it, an offering by fire, a soothing aroma to the Lord.

esv.text: The other lamb you shall offer at twilight. Like the grain offering of the morning, and like its drink offering, you shall offer it as a food offering, with a pleasing aroma to the Lord.

cnv.text: 晚上你要獻上另一隻公羊羔，要照著早晨的素祭，和同獻的奠祭獻上，作馨香的火祭獻給耶和華。

ccb.text: 傍晚献羊羔时，也要像早上一样同时献上素祭和奠祭，作蒙耶和华悦纳的馨香火祭。
